title.en: Week 24 2026 Refrigeration & Heat Pump Industry Briefing
title.zh: 2026年第24周制冷与热泵行业简报

subtitle.en: IRN 2026 closes with ammonia vs CO₂ TCO debate (10–11 Jun); MEE 2027 ODS/HFC quota draft zero growth (10 Jun); IEA: heat pumps competitive in 16 EU countries (12 Jun); GoodWe PV-driven heat pumps at SNEC (11 Jun); Differ Power 9-in-1 R290 hub preview (12 Jun)
subtitle.zh: IRN 2026 闭幕聚焦氨 vs CO₂ 全生命周期（6/10–11）；生态环境部 6/10 发布 2027 配额征求意见稿总量零增长；IEA 6/12：16 国住宅热泵持有成本优于燃气锅炉；GoodWe 6/11 SNEC 发布光伏直驱热泵；Differ Power 6/12 预览 9 合 1 R290 能源枢纽

en: IRN 2026 (10–11 Jun): IIAR keynotes; Star Refrigeration ammonia vs CO₂ lifecycle cost session
MEE draft 2027 ODS/HFC quota plan (10 Jun): zero growth; HFC-245fa cross-category cap raised to 50%
IEA analysis (12 Jun): residential heat pumps cost-competitive vs gas boilers in 16 EU countries
GoodWe GoodHeat (11 Jun): DC-coupled air-to-water heat pumps 6–34.15 kW at SNEC Shanghai
Differ Power D1 Series preview (12 Jun): 9-in-1 R290 solar-storage heat pump ahead of Intersolar Europe
zh: IRN 2026（6/10–11）：IIAR 主旨演讲；Star Refrigeration 氨 vs CO₂ 全生命周期成本专题
生态环境部 6/10 发布 2027 年度 ODS/HFC 配额征求意见稿：总量零增长；HFC-245fa 跨品类调增上限提至 50%
IEA 6/12 分析：16 个欧盟国家住宅热泵全生命周期持有成本优于燃气锅炉
GoodWe GoodHeat 6/11 于 SNEC 上海发布 6–34.15 kW 光伏直驱空气源热泵
Differ Power 6/12 预览 D1 系列 9 合 1 R290 光储热泵，面向 Intersolar Europe 展前发布

en: On 10 Jun 2026 China’s Ministry of Ecology and Environment released for public comment the draft 2027 ODS and HFC production/import quota allocation plan. Total HFC production quota is unchanged from 2026 (zero growth), reinforcing the tight-balance narrative from week 23. Notable adjustments include raising the cross-category transfer cap for HFC-245fa—from 30% to 50%—to support polyurethane foam substitution as the HCFC-141b on-site spray ban takes effect on 1 Jul 2026, with the transferred quota restricted to foam use only. The draft tightens import access, clarifies irreversible penalties for over-production or mis-use (2–5× quota cuts in the following year), and sets application deadlines: all firms must file 2027 quota and initial transfer requests by 31 Oct 2026, with only two mid-year adjustment windows in Apr and Aug 2027.

The domestic HCFC-141b phase-out reaches a critical milestone in three weeks. From 1 Jul 2026, on-site polyurethane spray foam using HCFC-141b is prohibited under the national Montreal Protocol implementation plan (2025–2030)—directly affecting cold-room construction, logistics hubs, and industrial insulation retrofits. Extruded polystyrene foam HCFC blowing agents and HCFC solvent/cleaning uses in electronics and machinery also end on the same date. Contractors should complete material substitution, worker retraining, and recovery documentation before peak summer project delivery; the HFC-245fa quota flexibility in the 2027 draft is explicitly linked to this foam transition.

EU F-Gas Regulation (EU) 2024/573 continues to reshape the compliance landscape as mid-2026 approaches. From 1 Jan 2027, monoblock heat pumps and air-conditioning units ≤12 kW placed on the EU market must use refrigerants with GWP below 150—accelerating R290 and R744 product lines previewed this week. Member states must adapt national F-gas handler certification to EU-standardised training by 11 Mar 2027, with mandatory refresher every seven years. Cross-border contractors face rising costs from fragmented legacy certifications converging to a single EU benchmark—overlapping with the US DOE fuel-switching rebate rollback (week 23) and ongoing AIM Act enforcement against illegal HFC imports highlighted in EIA’s February 2026 bulletin.
zh: 生态环境部于2026年6月10日发布《2027年度消耗臭氧层物质和氢氟碳化物配额总量设定与分配方案（征求意见稿）》。2027年 HFC 生产配额总量与2026年持平（零增长），延续第23周紧平衡判断。配套2026年7月聚氨酯行业 HCFC-141b 全面淘汰，HFC-245fa 跨品类调增比例由30%放宽至50%，且该品类配额专款专用、不得转为其他 HFC 品类。征求意见稿同时收紧进口准入、细化超配额/超用途生产销售的不可逆追责（按违规量2–5倍核减次年配额），并明确2026年10月31日前须完成2027年度配额及初次流转申请，2027年仅4月、8月两次年中调整窗口。

国内 HCFC-141b 淘汰进入倒计时——距**2026年7月1日**现场聚氨酯 HCFC-141b 喷涂禁令仅剩约三周，直接影响冷库、物流枢纽及工业保温施工。《中国履行〈蒙特利尔议定书〉国家方案（2025—2030年）》同步规定：挤出聚苯乙烯泡沫 HCFC 发泡剂及电子、仪器、机械等领域 HCFC 溶剂/清洗剂亦于同日禁限。施工企业宜在迎峰度夏前完成发泡剂替代、人员再培训及回收台账；2027配额草案对 HFC-245fa 的跨品类调增即针对泡沫替代缺口。

欧盟 F-Gas 法规 (EU) 2024/573 合规压力随年中临近上升：**2027年1月1日**起，投放欧盟市场的单体式热泵与空调（≤12 kW）须使用 GWP<150 工质——与本周密集发布的 R290 产品线形成政策共振。成员国须于**2027年3月11日**前将 F 气体从业人员认证体系适配欧盟统一培训标准，并落实至少每七年一次的强制复训。跨境承包商面临各国遗留认证向欧盟基准收敛的成本上升——叠加第23周美国 DOE 叫停联邦燃气改电返利及 AIM 法案非法 HFC 进口执法（EIA 2026年2月通报），全球合规环境呈「欧严美分化、亚中配额锁量」格局。

en: IEA commentary circulated widely on 12 Jun 2026 argues that residential heat pumps are cost-competitive with gas boilers over their lifetime in 16 EU countries—roughly one-third of EU residential space-heating demand—with annual energy savings up to €800 where electricity-to-gas price ratios are favourable (Netherlands, Portugal, Bulgaria among non-Nordic leaders at 15–30% lower ownership cost). In 11 major markets including Germany, France and Poland—two-thirds of EU heating demand—total ownership costs remain equal or higher at 2025 prices, but the gap is below 5% in all but five, suggesting targeted upfront subsidies or tariff reform could shift the balance. For low-temperature industrial heat, heat pumps are already cheaper than gas boilers in 17 countries covering 40% of EU demand. The analysis contrasts with week-23 US federal rebate retrenchment and underscores that policy design, not technology alone, drives deployment pace.

European R290 heat-pump visibility continues to rise even as R32 dominates listings. A 2026 EU market index snapshot tracks 537 R290 models versus 13,935 R32 entries (0.88% vs 22.85% share)—concentrated below 6 kW but increasingly visible in buyer searches. MHIAE’s Hydrolution EZY R290 monobloc range added 10 kW and 14 kW models shipping from Jun 2026, extending propane platforms to larger homes and small commercial sites. GoodWe previewed its GoodHeat R290 residential and 50–100 kW commercial lines for Intersolar Europe (23–25 Jun), while Differ Power’s 12–16 kW D1 Series positions the heat pump as a nine-function energy hub—signalling that product differentiation is shifting from COP alone to PV–storage–thermal integration.
zh: IEA 分析于2026年6月12日获行业媒体广泛引用：按2025年价格，16个欧盟国家（约占欧盟住宅供暖需求三分之一）住宅热泵全生命周期持有成本优于燃气锅炉，电/气价比有利市场年省能源费用最高约800欧元；荷兰、葡萄牙、保加利亚等非北欧市场持有成本较燃气锅炉低15%–30%。德、法、波等11个主要市场（约占需求三分之二）热泵持有成本仍等于或高于燃气锅炉，但除5国外差距均低于5%——前期补贴或电价机制改革即可扭转。工业低温用热方面，17国（占欧盟低温需求约40%）热泵已较燃气锅炉更经济。该判断与第23周美国联邦返利收缩形成对照，再次表明部署节奏取决于政策设计而非单纯技术成熟度。

欧洲 R290 热泵「可见度」持续上升，R32 仍占主导。2026年欧盟市场指数快照显示 R290 机型537款、R32 约1.39万款（份额0.88% vs 22.85%），功率段仍集中在6 kW以下但已进入采购检索主流。MHIAE Hydrolution EZY R290 单体式系列新增10 kW、14 kW 机型2026年6月起供货，拓展丙烷平台至更大住宅与小商用场景。GoodWe 6月10日预告 Intersolar Europe（6/23–25）展出 GoodHeat R290 住宅及50–100 kW 商用线；Differ Power 6/12 预览12–16 kW D1 九合一能源枢纽——产品竞争正从 COP 单点指标转向光储热一体化协同。

en: With FAS 2026/550 in its second enforcement week (refrigerators and road/tunnel LED from 1 Jun), firms should note the next catalogue milestone: projector energy labels under the same regulation take effect 1 Jul 2026—coinciding with the HCFC-141b construction ban. Dual label catalogues (FAS 2025/45 for HP/chiller units vs 2026/550 for appliances/lighting) require SKU-level traceability through e-commerce and tender documentation. Exporters to the EU must align test reports and refrigerant declarations with the approaching 2027 GWP<150 placement ban for small split and monoblock systems.

Global refrigerant supply-chain integrity remains under enforcement pressure. Honeywell coordinated Polish customs seizure of suspected patent-infringing R1234yf at Gdynia in May 2026; US industry groups warn of counterfeit R-454B cylinders mimicking trusted brands. EPA AIM Act criminal cases continue—Extreme Residential’s guilty plea for unauthorised R-410A import faces sentencing scheduled 17 Jun 2026. Purchasers should verify authorised supply chains, refuse disposable cylinders (banned in the EU since 2007), and require SDS with REACH registration numbers—particularly as A2L transitions expand charge-handling requirements.
zh: 550号文进入施行第二周（冰箱与道路隧道 LED 自6/1起），下一节点为**2026年7月1日**投影机能效标识实施——与 HCFC-141b 施工禁令同日。企业须并行管理 FAS 2025/45（热泵冷水等）与 2026/550（家电/照明）两套目录，在电商与招投标中按 SKU 对应实施规则与检测报告。出口欧盟产品须同步准备2027年小功率分体/单体式 GWP<150 投放禁限所需的工质声明与型式试验资料。

全球制冷剂供应链合规压力不减：Honeywell 协调波兰海关2026年5月在格丁尼亚查获涉嫌专利侵权 R1234yf；美国行业组织警示假冒 R-454B 钢瓶仿冒知名品牌。EPA AIM 法案刑事执法持续推进——Extreme Residential 未经授权进口 R-410A 案认罪，量刑定于2026年6月17日。采购端应核验授权渠道、拒收欧盟禁止的一次性钢瓶，并要求 SDS 含 REACH 注册号——A2L 工质切换扩大充注作业资质需求背景下尤为关键。

en: The third Industrial Refrigeration Network Conference (IRN 2026) concluded on 10–11 Jun at BITZER’s SCHAUFLER Academy in Rottenburg-Ergenzingen, Germany. IIAR leadership delivered keynotes; technical sessions covered CO₂ chillers, heat exchangers, lubricants, and industrial refrigeration cybersecurity. Star Refrigeration’s Dr Robert Lamb presented “Beyond the Hype”, comparing ammonia and CO₂ for a 35,000 m³ cold store at −22 °C: modelled annual energy use of ~910,000 kWh (low-charge ammonia) vs ~1.25 million kWh (transcritical CO₂)—roughly £86,000/year at 25p/kWh—arguing technology choice should balance capex, opex, compliance and resilience rather than ideology. For industrial fluid screening, see this site’s HTHP working-fluid page and HTHP column.

PV–heat-pump integration moved centre stage this week. GoodWe’s GoodHeat line (launched at SNEC Shanghai, reported 11 Jun) routes DC from rooftop PV directly to the unit’s internal DC bus (6–34.15 kW, COP up to 4.70 on the 6 kW model, Panasonic EVI compressors, 60 °C outlet on smaller units). Differ Power’s D1 Series preview (12 Jun) integrates heating, cooling, DHW, PV inversion, battery PCS, backup power and home energy management in one R290 platform—recovering inverter waste heat to boost COP. GoodWe will exhibit connected residential and 50–100 kW commercial R290 systems at Intersolar Europe, Hall B4 Booth 210, 23–25 Jun—extending the IRN natural-refrigerant narrative into prosumer markets.
zh: 第三届工业制冷网络大会（IRN 2026）于6月10–11日在德国 Rottenburg-Ergenzingen 的 SCHAUFLER Academy 闭幕。IIAR 领导致主旨演讲；技术议题涵盖 CO₂ 冷水机、换热器、润滑剂及工业制冷网络安全。Star Refrigeration 的 Robert Lamb 博士发表「Beyond the Hype」，以3.5万 m³、−22 °C 冷库建模：低充注氨系统年耗电约91万 kWh、跨临界 CO₂ 约125万 kWh——按25便士/kWh 年运营费差约8.6万英镑——强调选型应综合资本、运营、合规与韧性而非意识形态。工质筛选详见本站高温热泵工质页与高温热泵专栏。

光伏—热泵融合成为本周产品主线。GoodWe GoodHeat（6/11 报道于 SNEC 上海发布）将屋顶光伏 DC 直接接入机组内部直流母线（6–34.15 kW，6 kW 机型 COP 最高4.70，Panasonic EVI 压缩机，小机型出水最高60 °C）。Differ Power 6/12 预览 D1 系列在 R290 平台上集成供暖、制冷、生活热水、光伏逆变、电池 PCS、备电与家庭能源管理，并回收逆变器废热提升 COP。GoodWe 将于6/23–25 Intersolar Europe B4-210 展出互联住宅及50–100 kW 商用 R290 系统——将 IRN 天然工质议题延伸至户用能源枢纽场景。

en: Intersolar Europe / The smarter E Europe: 23–25 Jun 2026, Messe München—GoodWe (B4-210), Differ Power (C2-655) among heat-pump and storage exhibitors. China’s HCFC-141b on-site polyurethane spray ban and FAS 2026/550 projector labels both effective 1 Jul 2026.
Chillventa 2026 Nuremberg: 13–15 Oct 2026. ISH Shanghai & CIHE 2026 remains scheduled for Autumn 2026 at SNIEC. EPA AIM Act sentencing in the Extreme Residential R-410A import case: 17 Jun 2026.
zh: Intersolar Europe / The smarter E Europe：2026年6月23–25日，慕尼黑 Messe——GoodWe（B4-210）、Differ Power（C2-655）等将展出热泵与储能融合方案。国内 HCFC-141b 现场聚氨酯喷涂禁令与 550 号文投影机标识均于2026年7月1日生效。
Chillventa 2026 纽伦堡定于2026年10月13–15日；ISH Shanghai & CIHE 2026 仍计划2026年秋季于上海新国际博览中心举办。EPA AIM 法案 Extreme Residential 非法进口 R-410A 案量刑：2026年6月17日。
